convention.pages: /<slug>/ (nested paths preserved, e.g. /financials/2014-annual-report/, /volunteer/seattle/); ugly job slugs remapped to /careers/<clean-slug>/; root person profiles folded into /team/<slug>/; v1/-old drafts redirected to their live equivalent
convention.posts: /news/<slug>/ (slug from WP post slug, sanitized; messy/encoded/duplicate WP slugs regenerated from the post title; collisions disambiguated)
convention.events: /events/<slug>/ (index at /events/; events content currently empty, slugs preserved for URL parity)

seo.notes: Explicit Yoast meta-description is almost never set (pages=7/82, posts=1/196), but og_description is broadly populated (pages=62/82, posts=196/196 = all posts) and every record has a yoast title + canonical. og_image present on 45/82 pages and 142/196 posts. Astro approach: build a getMeta() helper that resolves description via a fallback chain yoast_head_json.description -> og_description -> excerpt.rendered (stripped of HTML, truncated ~155 chars). Resolve title from yoast_head_json.title (strip the ' - Juma' suffix and re-append a single site-name template), and og:image from yoast_head_json.og_image[0].url with a site-wide default fallback (the 45 pages/54 posts missing og_image, e.g. career/job pages, should inherit a branded default share image). Rewrite all canonical/og:url values from the old https://juma.org/<old> to the new path so canonicals point at the new convention, and emit the same fields via an Astro <SEO> component / Layout frontmatter at build time.
